research_gate: GP2 source, hostile tests, contract and module context implement the accepted design. Focused, retained, independent and registered complete verification pass. GP2 is bounded closed and no later package is authorized.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized bounded GP2 implementation and closure only. No universal currency, positive cycle, dominant conversion, grind, graphics, runtime, persistence, network, monetization, Greenfield dependency, C3B authority, GP3 or GP4.
context_health: GP2 is the unique recorded item. Its 18-rule typed progression implementation passes 7 GP2, 7 GP1 and 14 GP0 tests, independent acceptance and registered complete run run-2dc3db644adc416a8ef56461dbb771b6. Generated context is current; stop before GP3.

macro_findings: Mind Warp remains the first product customer and GP2 follows the structurally complete GP0-GP1 path.
Progress must unlock named decisions rather than merely accelerate repetition.
GP3 encounter grammar, runtime, Companion and Greenfield authority remain separate.
micro_findings: Durable progression must consume a replay-validated terminal BaseLoopStateV1 and bind its canonical digest.
Only explicit per-session and per-outcome rules create progression; caller FailEncounter costs and tools outside the exact allowlist have no durable authority.
Power grants require an exact allowlisted prepared tool and successful allowlisted outcome; combat diversion grants nothing.
The implementation has 18 private fixed rules, strict terminal replay and historical reconstruction, typed liabilities, zero conversions/resets and exact five-session strategy proofs.
Independent review accepted the bounded GP2 implementation with no remaining blocker.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: GP2 implementation is typed and engine-neutral with no admitted visual asset.

tiers_completed.result: GP2 recovery-map scope, GP1 input authority and the provisional adversarial matrix define one bounded design problem.
The accepted receipt freezes five distinct record families, exact input and receipt authority, guarded flow rules, S1 capability rules and deterministic strategy proof obligations.
Seven GP2 tests plus seven GP1 and fourteen GP0 regressions pass with strict historical reconstruction and hostile forgery rejection.
Independent static and bounded verification accepted GP2 with no remaining blocker.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Exact-token continuity verifiers can become stale when a downstream stage legitimately advances a shared contract.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Complete integration is confirmed; future work should replace stale negative sentence tokens with stage-aware invariant assertions.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No GP3/runtime/Greenfield/C3B authority enters GP2 closure.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Satisfied: registered complete gate passed; do not start C4V or GP3.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Focused GP2, retained GP1 and GP0, workspace, independent and one registered complete Forge gate.

exit_criteria.label: Knowledge, access, relationship, construction and power remain typed and non-aliasing.
Every source, sink, reset, conversion and exploit boundary is explicit and replay-bound.
Deterministic strategy simulations reject universal resources, positive cycles and a dominant conversion path.
GP2 adds no runtime, universal currency, grind, Greenfield, C3B, GP3 or GP4 authority.
